description: Defines a 3D cutting plane for cross-sectioning solid shapes via slice3d. Use with axis-aligned planes (x, y, z) or arbitrary normal vectors.
utility: Define a cutting plane for slice3d cross-sections of 3D solid shapes

arguments.name: axis
arguments.description: Axis-aligned plane orientation. y = horizontal cut, x = side cut, z = front cut

arguments.name: nx ny nz
arguments.description: Arbitrary plane normal vector (3 numbers). Use instead of axis for oblique cuts

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position along axis or normal (0-1 range, default 0.5). 0 = bottom/start, 1 = top/end
